name: little-nour
description: Little Nour — A cute drawing-puzzle adventure game

scripts.build: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force www -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force www; Copy-Item index.html www/; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force css www/css; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force js www/js"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android

author: Little Nour Team
